title: SiTime Q1 2023 Earnings Preview - Recovery Phase Begins
text: SiTime was scheduled to announce Q1 earnings results on Wednesday, May 3rd, after market close. The consensus EPS Estimate was $0.00 and the consensus Revenue Estimate was $38M (-45.9% Y/Y). Over the last 2 years, SITM had beaten EPS estimates 100% of the time and had beaten revenue estimates 100% of the time. However, over the last 3 months, EPS estimates had seen 0 upward revisions and 5 downward, while Revenue estimates had seen 0 upward revisions and 4 downward. When the company reported, SiTime delivered Q1 results in line with its guidance, with revenue for the quarter of $38.3 million, non-GAAP gross margins of $61.8 million, and non-GAAP EPS of $0.09 per share.
